title: Miracul212
body:
![Miraculous](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/543f8f52d4e2f2882a6a8bd1a5d0b070e8d09c3b.jpeg)

✨ **Miraculous Modpack** – A carefully crafted experience focused on **performance, visuals, and immersive gameplay** while staying lightweight and smooth.

[offical website](https://fouad212212.github.io/Miracul212/)
---

<details>
<summary>🚀 Performance and Optimization</summary>

Optimized for smooth gameplay and high FPS, even on mid-range systems:

- Embeddium  
- Oculus  
- FerriteCore  
- ModernFix  
- Entity Culling  
- Noisium  
- Starlight  
- BadOptimizations  
- Dynamic FPS  
- ImmediatelyFast  
- Memory Leak Fix  
- RRLS  
- Fastload Reforged  
- Rubidium Extra  
- GPU Tape  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🎨 Visuals and Immersion</summary>

Enhances graphics, animations, and overall atmosphere:

- Entity Texture Features  
- Entity Model Features  
- Skin Layers 3D  
- Prism  
- Chat Animation  
- Sound Physics Remastered  
- Chat Heads  
- Photon  
- CIT Resewn  
- Continuity  
- Polytone  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🧰 Quality of Life</summary>

Improves usability, interface, and everyday gameplay experience:

- JEI (Just Enough Items)  
- Jade  
- Xaero's Minimap  
- Xaero's World Map  
- AppleSkin  
- Vein Miner  
- Mouse Tweaks  
- Shulker Box Tooltip  
- Carry On  
- WI Zoom  
- Do a Barrel Roll  
- Freecam  
- Spark  
- Clumps  
- Sit  
- Showcase Item  
- Watut  
- Skin Restorer  
- Self Expression  
- Better Third Person  
- Melody  
- Kleider's Custom Renderer  
- BetterF3  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌐 Multiplayer and Social</summary>

Built-in features for better multiplayer interaction and connectivity:

- Simple Voice Chat  
- e4mc (Easy LAN to Online)  
- CraftPresence (Discord Integration)  
- Essential  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌍 Gameplay and Content</summary>

Adds new mechanics, decorations, creatures, and immersive features:

- Nastia's Miracle Stones  
- Unified Stones (Nastia Extension)  
- Alex's Mobs  
- Naturalist  
- Farmer's Delight  
- Supplementaries  
- Another Furniture  
- Handcrafted  
- Traveler's Backpack  
- Exposure  
- Exposure Polaroid  
- Immersive Vehicles  
- New Cars  
- Modern Japan City  
- Deco Storage  
- GWoodworks  
- Dinnerware  
- Spudacious Shops  
- FazRoleplay Clothes  
- ClothingCraft  
- CityCraft  
- Illias Addon  

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙️ Libraries and Dependencies</summary>

Core libraries required for stability, compatibility, and advanced features:

- UniLib  
- Architectury  
- GeckoLib  
- Resourceful Lib  
- Cloth Config  
- Kotlin for Forge  
- Citadel  
- Konkrete  
- MRU  
- CoroUtil  
- Iceberg  
- Moonlight Lib  
- Curios API  
- Fabric API (Connector)  
- Connector  
- CreativeCore  
- Decorative Core  
- MacuLib  
- Sounds  

</details>

---

💡 **Total Mods:** ~94 Mods  
⚙️ **Focus:** Performance • Visuals • Immersion • Lightweight Gameplay  
🌐 **Multiplayer Ready:** Yes
